title: Payments On-Call Handbook
content:
Payments On-Call Handbook

Scope: Primary guide for engineers on payments rotation.

On-Call Responsibilities:
- Monitor PagerDuty and #payments-incidents Slack channel.
- Acknowledge Sev-1 pages within 5 minutes; Sev-2 within 15 minutes.
- Execute Payment Outage Runbook for any payment degradation or outage.

First 15 Minutes Checklist:
1. Acknowledge alert and assess severity (see Payment SLA Policy).
2. Open incident bridge if Sev-1.
3. Check Grafana Payments-Prod dashboard: latency, errors, pool metrics.
4. Run synthetic probe: pay-probe --env prod.
5. Post initial status to #payments-incidents.

Key Runbooks and References:
- Payment Outage Runbook (detection, triage, escalation, recovery, comms)
- Payment SLA Policy (severity levels and targets)
- Escalation Matrix (internal — analyst access required for full contacts)

Handoff:
- End-of-shift summary in PagerDuty log.
- Open incidents must be documented before rotation ends.

Training: New on-call engineers must complete shadow rotation and runbook walkthrough before taking primary.
